title: Flaky Sweet Thai Sesame Flatbread
description: A light, tangy flatbread with a sweet crunch of sesame and sugar, perfect for kids and the whole family.
instructions: In a large bowl whisk together flour, sugar, baking powder and salt.
Create a well in the center and pour in warm milk, melted butter and yogurt; stir until a sticky dough forms.
Transfer the dough onto a floured surface and knead gently for 1–2 minutes until it just comes together.
Divide the dough into 8 equal portions and roll each into a thin oval, about 1/4 inch thick.
Heat a lightly oiled cast‑iron skillet or griddle over medium heat; cook each flatbread for 2–3 minutes per side or until golden and slightly crisp.
Remove from heat, sprinkle both sides with sesame seeds, then slice into bite‑size pieces.
Serve warm as a sweet snack or dessert.
Enjoy the crunchy, sweet, and tangy flavors that kids will love!
